mano_cua.result_summary: 快速连续触发5个Toast后，所有Toast在~4-5秒内同时消失（共享第一个Toast的定时器），第2-5个Toast未获得独立持续时间。且多个堆叠Toast时无层叠视觉效果。
mano_cua.last_reasoning: **CONFIRMED BUG!** After clicking the button 5 times rapidly and waiting 5 seconds, ALL Toasts have disappeared completely. When multiple Toasts are triggered in rapid succession (5 clicks), ALL Toasts disappear after approximately 4-5 seconds from the FIRST click, rather than each Toast getting its own independent 4-second duration. Expected: each Toast gets ~4s independent display. Actual: all 5 Toasts disappear within ~4-5s of the first click. Additionally, no stacking animation or shadow effect visible to indicate multiple queued Toasts.
